title: The Report Concerning al-Mada 'in al-Qu$wa, That Is, That Part (on the East Bank of the Tigris) in Which the King Had His Residence
description: The Report Concerning al-Mada 'in al-Qu$wa, That Is, That Part (on the East Bank of the Tigris) in Which the King Had His Residence. Recorded under the year 16 AH (637–638 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 13.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
